calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Nov-21-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: All parties and witnesses were sworn prior to the commencement of the proceedings.

Appearances: Irina Aerov for and with Galina Belotserskaya (Petitioner). Semyon Belotserkovsky (Respondent). Dmitry Belotserkovsky (Interpreter for Petitioner).

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence, the Court DENIED the requests for the reasons set forth on the record.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Court Reporter: Lewis Gillian CSR #12355. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.
